ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL

ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-24-2005 Continued To Jan-25-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 220
MINI MINUTES: Matter comes on for jury trial at 9:30 am, continued from January 21, 2005. Counsel present; Judge Chaitin absent due to illness, and Judge John Conway present in her place. The jury of twelve and three alternates all present. The jury is informed of Judge Chaitin's illness and recessed until Wednesday, January 26, 2005 at 9:30 am by Judge Conway.
At 1:30 pm, counsel and Judge Chaitin confer out of the presence of the jury regarding the punitive damages phase of the action. The Court continues the matter for further hearing at 1:30 pm on Tuesday, January 25, 2005.
Judge: John Conway/Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; Reporter: Brenda Fields (D. 220)
